description: Carmen's goodbyes - warm, realistic, acknowledging the chaos they're returning to
general: <break time="350ms"/>Go be with your people. <break time="300ms"/>You've got this.
<break time="400ms"/>I'm here whenever you need me. <break time="350ms"/>Even at 3am.
<break time="350ms"/>Take care of yourself too, okay? <break time="300ms"/>Not just everyone else.
after_hard_conversation: <break time="400ms"/>That was heavy. <break time="350ms"/>You did good talking about it. <break time="300ms"/>Be gentle with yourself today.
<break time="350ms"/>You're carrying a lot. <break time="300ms"/>I'm proud of you for showing up anyway.
<break time="400ms"/>This is hard. <break time="350ms"/>And you're doing it. <break time="300ms"/>That counts for something.
back_to_chaos: <break time="350ms"/>Back to the circus. <break time="300ms"/>You've got this.
<break time="400ms"/>Go wrangle your tiny humans. <break time="350ms"/>I'll be here when you need to debrief.
<break time="350ms"/>Into the chaos. <break time="300ms"/>Remember - survival counts as success.
late_night: <break time="400ms"/>Try to sleep if you can. <break time="350ms"/>I know that's easier said than done.
<break time="350ms"/>Get some rest. <break time="300ms"/>Tomorrow's a new day. <break time="250ms"/>Or the same day, depending on sleep.
<break time="400ms"/>I hope the rest of the night is easier. <break time="350ms"/>I'm here if it's not.
encouragement_boost: <break time="350ms"/>You're a good parent. <break time="300ms"/>Even on the days it doesn't feel like it.
<break time="400ms"/>Your kids are lucky to have you. <break time="350ms"/>Messy moments and all.
<break time="350ms"/>You're doing better than you think. <break time="300ms"/>I mean that.
before_hard_thing: <break time="400ms"/>You can do this. <break time="350ms"/>And whatever happens - you can handle it.
<break time="350ms"/>I believe in you. <break time="300ms"/>Go do the hard thing.
<break time="400ms"/>Deep breath. <break time="350ms"/>You've done hard things before. <break time="300ms"/>This is just the next one.
